_note: DRAFT Hausa — pending native-speaker + clinician sign-off (see Hausa Seed Kit). Missing keys fall back to English.

buddy.greeting: Sannu! Ni ne MobiCova Health Buddy. Ka tambaye ni karamar tambaya kan lafiya.
buddy.seeDoctor: MobiCova na iya hada ka da likita.
buddy.limitReached: Ka kai iyakar tambayoyin kyauta na yau. Ka dawo gobe.
buddy.cannotVerify: Bayani daga amintattun hanyoyin lafiya kawai nake iya bayarwa, kuma ban da tabbataccen amsa kan wannan ba. Da fatan ka ga likita.
